creator: will.brokenbourgh2877@gmail.com
text:
Greetings,

Please enable '--with-gtk=2.0' and '--with-python' on this package. I cannot use this package as-is with py27-gtk because of these missing options.  

If you cannot enable these by default, can you please fix the ports files so these options can be selected through `make config` when building from the ports tree?  I cannot use this package at all without being able to enable these options, and must build from external sources and the resulting package crashes constantly.

Thank you! :-)
